dialogues: You've been grouping by 5s all lesson. But 5s show up everywhere in real life! Which of these uses groups of 5?
Right. All of them! Hands have 5 fingers. Tallies group by 5s. Nickels are worth 5 cents. Clocks mark every 5 minutes. Grouping by 5s is everywhere, and now you use it for graphs too.
